positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a celestial forest where bioluminescent flora illuminates giant, stylized mushrooms and delicate, ethereal trees. The scene features a central, winding path leading deep into the woods. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant cyan, and phosphorescent lime green as the primary color palette. The composition must emphasize clean, strong silhouettes against a gradient deep space background. The art style should be a blend of detailed Art Nouveau lines and modern, clean vector aesthetics, giving it a dreamlike, mystical quality. Aspect ratio should be perfect for apparel printing, ensuring bold contrast and crisp edges. Focus on clean, stylized organic shapes and glowing light sources. --ar 1:1
